title: CameliaArmory
description: A mod brings lots of weapons into game.
body:
The mod brings lots of weapons into game.
All of the weapons has compacted with Better Combat

List of weapons:  
- Bastard Sword  
- Claymore  
- England LongBow  
- Halberd  
- Hengdao  
- Lucerne Hammer  
- Macuahuitl  
- Pike  
- Scythe  
- Spear  
- Spiny Maul  
- Tachi  
- Throwing Axe  
- Throwing Knife  
- Uchigatana  
- Wakizashi  
- Yumi  
- Zweihander  

![CameliaArmory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/702d401e0edde61e7c588e69e79c0cc3023215e6.png)
